1788660.name: Hitboxer
1788660.description:
A Side-scrolling Platformer, With a Focus on Lightning-Fast Combat!


Enter the arena and fight for victory (as a box of course.)

Dash into (or through) your opponents to eliminate them - pretty simple right?

Grab an armor powerup (on the levels that have them) to temporarily give yourself an extra hit point. Watch out - because most levels also feature deadly hazards designed to help keep players on their toes - or in some cases - to be used as additional tools in combat...

Also Worth Mentioning:


  • Multiple game modes - Including Deathmatch and Capture the Flag... as well as Soccer (because why not!)
  • Basic character customization.

Why is it Free?


We're very proud of all the hard work we put into making Hitboxer the game that it is today, but in it's current state we aren't confident that it has the amount of content, polish, replayability (and lack of bugs) that players would expect in a full game release.

We don't (at this time) have any plans to continue developing the game, but we still want to release it to show off what we accomplished and give anyone who wants a chance to play it!

Happy Hitboxing :)

Trailer Music and In-Game Music by Karl Casey @ White Bat Audio
